title: leucas abyssinica var. argyrophylla
intro: Leucas abyssinica var. argyrophylla, also known as white flower leucas or silver leaf leucas, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its fragrant white flowers and silvery leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leucas abyssinica var. argyrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as an essential oil in aromatherapy and herbal remedies.
